mapper.select: SELECT c.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM t_comment c LEFT JOIN t_user u ON c.user_id = u.user_id WHERE c.target_type = #{targetType} AND c.target_id = #{targetId} AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.create_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_comment (user_id, target_type, target_id, content, parent_id) VALUES (#{userId}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{content}, #{parentId})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_comment SET status = 0 WHERE comment_id = #{commentId} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_comment WHERE target_type = #{targetType} AND target_id = #{targetId} AND status = 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_comment
AND (content LIKE CONCAT('%',#{keyword},'%'))
